issues.title: VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor not working for streamed responses
issues.body:
Hi. I wanted to use a vector store as a chat memory implementation. However, it seems like there are some issues with this implementation when the response is in streaming mode.

**Bug description**  
When `VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor` is added to a chat client and the response is in streaming mode, the following error occurs:
`java.lang.IllegalStateException: Stream processing failed
at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api.BaseAdvisor.lambda$adviseStream$2(BaseAdvisor.java:73) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-20250513.183919-253.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
Suppressed: reactor.core.publisher.FluxOnAssembly$OnAssemblyException:
Error has been observed at the following site(s):
*__checkpoint ⇢ Handler com.test.AssistantController#askBot(UserMessage, Continuation) [DispatcherHandler]
*__checkpoint ⇢ HTTP POST "/ask" [ExceptionHandlingWebHandler]
Original Stack Trace:
at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api.BaseAdvisor.lambda$adviseStream$2(BaseAdvisor.java:73) ~[spring-ai-client-chat-1.0.0-20250513.183919-253.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxOnErrorResume$ResumeSubscriber.onError(FluxOnErrorResume.java:94) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxMap$MapSubscriber.onError(FluxMap.java:134) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxMap$MapSubscriber.onNext(FluxMap.java:114) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.MonoFlatMapMany$FlatMapManyInner.onNext(MonoFlatMapMany.java:251) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxContextWrite$ContextWriteSubscriber.tryOnNext(FluxContextWrite.java:115) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxDoFinally$DoFinallyConditionalSubscriber.tryOnNext(FluxDoFinally.java:172) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxPeekFuseable$PeekFuseableConditionalSubscriber.tryOnNext(FluxPeekFuseable.java:530) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxPublishOn$PublishOnConditionalSubscriber.runAsync(FluxPublishOn.java:1004) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.publisher.FluxPublishOn$PublishOnConditionalSubscriber.run(FluxPublishOn.java:1079) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.scheduler.WorkerTask.call(WorkerTask.java:84) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at reactor.core.scheduler.WorkerTask.call(WorkerTask.java:37) ~[reactor-core-3.6.5.jar:3.6.5]
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) ~[na:na]
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor$ScheduledFutureTask.run(ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor.java:304) ~[na:na]
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) ~[na:na]
at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) ~[na:na]
at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ~[na:na]
Caused by: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: exactly one of text or media must be specified
at org.springframework.util.Assert.isTrue(Assert.java:111) ~[spring-core-6.1.6.jar:6.1.6]
at org.springframework.ai.document.Document.<init>(Document.java:156) ~[spring-ai-commons-1.0.0-20250513.183919-255.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
at org.springframework.ai.document.Document$Builder.build(Document.java:384) ~[spring-ai-commons-1.0.0-20250513.183919-255.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore.VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.lambda$toDocuments$2(VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.java:188) ~[spring-ai-advisors-vector-store-1.0.0-20250513.183919-253.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) ~[na:na]
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:179) ~[na:na]
at java.base/java.util.AbstractList$RandomAccessSpliterator.forEachRemaining(AbstractList.java:722) ~[na:na]`

**Environment**
- Spring AI version: 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
- Vector store: pgvector

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Configure the chat client with `VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor`.
2. Call the chat client and attempt to convert the response content to flow:
   `chatClient.prompt(Prompt(listOf(UserMessage(input))).stream().content().asFlow())`

**Expected behavior**
The entire message is collected and persisted into the configured vector store without causing any interruptions or blocking of the stream.

comments.body:
The error is:
```
Caused by: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: exactly one of text or media must be specified 
at org.springframework.util.Assert.isTrue(Assert.java:111) ~[spring-core-6.1.6.jar:6.1.6] 
at org.springframework.ai.document.Document.<init>(Document.java:156) ~[spring-ai-commons-1.0.0-20250513.183919-255.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] 
at org.springframework.ai.document.Document$Builder.build(Document.java:384) ~[spring-ai-commons-1.0.0-20250513.183919-255.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] 
at org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore.VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.lambda$toDocuments$2(VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor.java:188) ~[spring-ai-advisors-vector-store-1.0.0-20250513.183919-253.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] 
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:197) ~[na:na] 
at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:179) ~[na:na] 
at java.base/java.util.AbstractList$RandomAccessSpliterator.forEachRemaining(AbstractList.java:722) ~[na:na]
```
I think you can debug this function: org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore.VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor#toDocuments ,whether the messages is empty:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dbf7d3a7-3c8a-419b-a7b0-5e5c822c9817)
The message is empty, but I'm not sure why.

Oh, I found may be the causing, It is always false:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4c1e93e5-c04f-4411-8c57-185b45ed556e)
I think this line should removed.
Anyway, I can see that in my case both the response text and media are null. So the problem can be somewhere before as well.

I see thet `VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor` deosn't override the default `adviseStream` method. Also, when debugging, I saw that the `after` method in `VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor` is invoked with the last message from the stream which has both text and media null and not with the whole aggregated response.
I had thought the test `PgVectorStoreWithChatMemoryAdvisorIT` had covered streaming, but I was wrong.  This should be added.

Yep @SkyBlazer92  There was a desire to refactor these classes and get rid of the abstract base class an inherit functionality from BaseAdvisor - it seems in this case we can't rely on the default behavior in BaseAdvisor.  I will fix this.  Thanks for reporting this.
